name: winadsec
description: Windows AD pentest + post-exploitation: full attack chain from unauthenticated discovery through UAC bypass, persistence, Sliver C2 bridge, and payload delivery generation
author: 0xb0rn3 | 0xbv1 | github.com/0xb0rn3

optional_dependencies.impacket: Core AD exploitation — pip install impacket
optional_dependencies.nmap: NSE DC fingerprinting — apt install nmap

operations.discover: Unauthenticated DC fingerprint: ports, SMB, LDAP rootDSE, OS, domain
operations.users: Enumerate domain users via LDAP or SAMR RID brute
operations.shares: SMB share enum with READ/WRITE tests
operations.passpol: Domain password policy (lockout threshold, min-length, complexity)
operations.kerberoast: Find SPN accounts, request TGS hashes (hashcat $krb5tgs$)
operations.asreproast: Dump AS-REP hashes for no-preauth users (hashcat $krb5asrep$)
operations.vulncheck: Zerologon, PetitPotam, NoPac, MachineAccountQuota, AD CS, SMBv1, signing
operations.bloodhound: Run bloodhound-python, output BH-compatible JSON zip
operations.loot: Scrape shares for cred files, GPP cpassword, SSH keys, .kdbx, configs
operations.exec: Remote command via WMI (impacket-wmiexec or native)
operations.privesc_check: PowerShell privesc audit with AMSI bypass: unquoted services, writable binaries, UAC, AlwaysInstallElevated, stored creds, PATH hijack, autoruns
operations.uac_bypass: HKCU registry hijack → auto-elevating binary (fodhelper/eventvwr/wsreset) → arbitrary elevated payload
operations.lsa_fix: UAC bypass → set LimitBlankPasswordUse=0 (fixes blank-password SMB auth)
operations.persistence: Install/remove payload persistence: run_key | startup_folder | scheduled_task | service | wmi_sub | all_user
operations.sliver_spawndll: Reflective DLL injection via Sliver spawndll
operations.sliver_getsystem: Escalate to SYSTEM via Sliver getsystem
operations.sliver_whoami: Get current user context via Sliver
operations.sliver_impersonate: Impersonate logged-in user token via Sliver
operations.sliver_make_token: Create logon session with given credentials via Sliver
operations.gen_proxy_dll: Compile version.dll proxy sideloading DLL (AMSI+ETW patch + WinHTTP C2 loader + explorer.exe injection)
operations.gen_uac_dll: Compile UAC bypass DLL (fodhelper + COM IShellDispatch2 auto-elevate)
operations.gen_shellcode: Convert PE/EXE to raw shellcode via donut
operations.gen_payload: XOR-encrypt shellcode with 4-byte LE length prefix → update.bin
operations.gen_sliver: Generate Sliver implant (EXE/DLL/shellcode) via sliver-client generate
operations.gen_iso: Create delivery ISO: signed legit EXE + malicious version.dll
operations.gen_all: Full chain: Sliver implant → donut → XOR payload + proxy DLL + UAC DLL + ISO
operations.auto: Safe pipeline: discover → vulncheck → users → groups → shares → passpol → asreproast [+ kerberoast/bloodhound/privesc_check/lsa_fix if creds]

attack_chain: 1. gen_sliver — generate Sliver EXE implant (C2 callback to c2_http_port)
2. gen_shellcode — convert to raw shellcode via donut
3. gen_payload — XOR encrypt → update.bin, serve on c2_port
4. gen_proxy_dll — compile version.dll that downloads + injects update.bin
5. gen_iso — bundle version.dll + signed OneDriveSetup.exe into ISO
6. Deliver ISO to target; user double-clicks signed EXE → DLL loads → C2 back
10. persistence — install wmi_sub or run_key for reboot survival

persistence_methods.run_key: HKCU Run key — fires on user logon, no admin needed
persistence_methods.startup_folder: User Startup folder copy — fires on logon, no admin
persistence_methods.scheduled_task: schtasks onlogon task — no admin for user scope
persistence_methods.wmi_sub: WMI EventFilter+CommandLineEventConsumer — fires 60s after boot, requires admin, stealthiest
persistence_methods.all_user: HKLM Run key — fires for every user, requires admin

uac_methods.fodhelper: ms-settings HKCU hijack → fodhelper.exe auto-elevates → PAYLOAD runs as high-integrity
uac_methods.eventvwr: mscfile HKCU hijack → eventvwr.exe → elevated payload
uac_methods.wsreset: AppX HKCU hijack → wsreset.exe → elevated payload
